name: dev-marketplace
description: Local development marketplace for DevContainer plugins

plugins.name: git-worktree
plugins.description: Create and delete Git worktrees with conventional naming: {project}-{name} on branch {name}

plugins.name: roadmap
plugins.description: Generate or update ROADMAP.md with completed features and future proposals

plugins.name: dependency-update
plugins.description: Scan and update project dependencies across all ecosystems to their latest versions

plugins.name: read-arxiv-paper
plugins.description: Download arXiv paper LaTeX source, analyze it, and produce a project-contextualized summary

plugins.name: security-check
plugins.description: Security vulnerability review of code changes with 3-phase sub-agent pipeline and false-positive filtering
